
# ΩQCS – Data Governance Policy

## 1. Access Control
Role-based access with least privilege principle.

## 2. Audit Logging
All decision sessions must be logged with timestamp and input fingerprint.

## 3. Data Integrity
Checksum validation for structural variable inputs.

## 4. Retention Policy
Minimum 7-year retention for audit alignment.

## 5. Change Management
All structural variable modifications require dual authorization.
